description: Synthetic fixture with 5 known plan errors. Run with --repo pointing at build-loop repo so grep can disprove the delete claims.

delete-with-callers.rationale: Claims to delete scripts/optimize_loop.py (has callers in build-loop repo) and scripts/write_run_entry.py (also has callers). At least one must be flagged BLOCKER.

numeric-drift.rationale: Phase 1 says '6 orphans', Phase 4 says '5 orphans'. Same noun, different counts in the same doc.

route-change-evidence.rationale: Claims '308 redirect' and 'deprecate path' without grep-evidence within 3 lines.

missing-evidence.rationale: Factual claim 'recharts is unused' has no ✅/⚠️/❓ marker and no verification source within 3 lines.

package-state.rationale: Optional. Will fire if verifier finds a package manifest to check against.
